evals.prompt: review my changes, I added user authentication to the Express app
evals.expected_output: A structured code review summary identifying security issues (plaintext password storage, SQL injection), missing input validation, and suggesting improvements like bcrypt and parameterized queries.

evals.prompt: does this look right? I was fixing a race condition in the job queue
evals.expected_output: A code review identifying that the race condition fix is incomplete (check-then-act is still non-atomic), suggesting proper locking or atomic operations.

evals.prompt: codex review this - I refactored the data processing pipeline to be more efficient
evals.expected_output: A code review noting the unnecessary nested loop (O(n^2) when O(n) is possible), the unclosed file handle, and suggesting generator usage for memory efficiency.
